primary_accounting_issue: Appréciation du critère SPPI en IFRS 9 pour un actif financier comportant des clauses contractuelles pouvant modifier le calendrier ou le montant des flux de trésorerie en cas d’événement déclencheur.

authority_resolution.selection_reason: I selected IFRS 9 because it is the only governing standard in the provided context that directly addresses classification of financial assets and the SPPI assessment; no overlapping higher- or lower-precedence governing document competes on this issue.
authority_resolution.residual_uncertainty: low — the question is directly about SPPI and contractual cash flow characteristics, which are expressly governed by IFRS 9.

primary_authority.reason: These paragraphs directly govern classification of financial assets and the SPPI assessment for instruments whose contractual terms can change timing or amount of cash flows.

supporting_authority.reason: These paragraphs clarify the meaning of a basic lending arrangement, give examples of SPPI and non-SPPI features, and explain de minimis and non-genuine features.
This paragraph provides the residual measurement basis when the SPPI-based categories are not met.

peripheral_authority.reason: These paragraphs concern separation of components in insurance contracts, not SPPI classification of financial assets.
These paragraphs address liability-versus-equity classification and own-equity settlement, not the SPPI test for financial assets.
These paragraphs deal with hedge accounting rather than contractual cash flow characteristics under IFRS 9.

treatment_families.family: Financial assets that meet the SPPI condition and are held in a hold-to-collect business model
Financial assets that meet the SPPI condition and are held in a business model achieved by both collecting contractual cash flows and selling
Financial assets that do not qualify for an SPPI-based measurement category

approaches.label: Amortised cost
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies amortised cost as a top-level measurement category when the asset passes SPPI and is held to collect contractual cash flows.

approaches.label: Fair value through other comprehensive income
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies fair value through other comprehensive income as a top-level measurement category when the asset passes SPPI and is held both to collect and to sell.

approaches.label: Fair value through profit or loss
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 uses fair value through profit or loss as the residual top-level measurement category when the asset does not fall into an SPPI-based category.
